NUZU News is an independent news aggregator dedicated to factual, multi-source reporting. We pull from the world's most trusted outlets to bring you comprehensive coverage across politics, global affairs, technology, business, sports, and culture — updated every hour. How to set NUZU as your homepage:
Chrome: Settings → On startup → Open a specific page → Add https://nuzunews.github.io/
Firefox: Settings → Home → Homepage → Custom URLs → paste the URL above
Safari: Preferences → General → Homepage → paste the URL above
Edge: Settings → Start, home, and new tabs → Open these pages → Add the URL above
